```bash
`r config$remote$head_prompt` nano serial-job.sh
`r config$remote$head_prompt` cat serial-job.sh
```

```bash
`r config$remote$shebang`
`r config$sched$comment` `r config$sched$flag$name` solo-job
`r config$sched$comment` `r config$sched$flag$queue` `r config$sched$queue$testing`
`r config$sched$comment` -N 1
`r config$sched$comment` -n 1

# Load the computing environment we need
module load `r config$remote$modules$python`
module load `r config$remote$modules$mpi`

# Activate the virtual environment
source ~/venv/bin/activate

# Execute the task
amdahl
```

```bash
`r config$remote$head_prompt` `r config$sched$submit$name` serial-job.sh
```
